name: agent-bell
description: Windows-first voice notifications that call you back when Codex completes a turn or needs attention.

interface.shortDescription: Hear when Codex needs your attention
interface.longDescription: Agent Bell announces completed Codex turns, permission requests, and conservative failure signals on Windows. It works with Windows SAPI and can use an optional local custom-voice provider.
defaultPrompt: Set up Agent Bell in model-free Lite mode and run a test announcement.
